narrative:
Gasper Township has 2,811 registered voters, with 52.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 38.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 29.8 percentage points.
